items.title: 3 Button Scrapper Power 31.6k Realistic
items.rotation:
More or less Sword 2 into Grenade Barrage or Shredder Gyro. Priority order is
              Sword 2, Grenade Barrage, Shredder Gyro. Try not to cancel auto attack chains.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity engineer build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              Realistic Conditions = 10 boons, 10 conditions on golem. This build has traits that scale with both boons
              on you and conditions on enemy. This means the damage will be variable some based on your composition.
              Sometimes you will do more sometimes less.

              I don't really play engi. This is from a request. This may not be the absolute best option but this is the
              best I came up with.

              I found rifle turret belt skill spam to be about similar dps as the gyro (a little worse) but the
              cooldowns lined up less nicely + you had a lot less cleave. So I took gyro. And superspeed spam will be
              useful.
